description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7.0-alpine Docker image, defining variables DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST, and a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores /root/nltk_data/. Include a before_script that runs pwd, pip install -r requirements.txt, and python -m nltk.downloader all. Define two stages: qa and deploy. In the qa stage add a linting job that runs pycodestyle -v --benchmark sentiment.py. In the deploy stage add a smoketest job that runs python sentiment.py and a dummydeploy job that runs echo "dummy deploy". No special rules, artifacts, or external services are required.
